title: Sim: exponent search to match stated shares
summary: Calibrate the IIA exponent to match three stated market-share proportions.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_exponent_search"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
exponent_range = [0.1, 5.0, 0.001]

["cs::sim_exponent_search".stated_proportions]
ProductA = 0.40
ProductB = 0.35
ProductC = 0.25

title: Sim: exponent search (narrow range, high precision)
summary: Calibrate with a tighter search range when you have a prior estimate.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_exponent_search"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
exponent_range = [0.8, 2.0, 0.0001]

["cs::sim_exponent_search".stated_proportions]
ProductA = 0.45
ProductB = 0.30
ProductC = 0.25
